{{Infobox madra
| name = Sword-aspect madra
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] is made up entirely of [[sword]]-aspect [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] uses [[sword]]-[[madra]] to slice through glass walls.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] can manifest solid [[sword]]-[[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
